creator: ports@toco-domains.de
text:
Created attachment 169185
patch with update to 2.7.2

Hello,

attached a patch to bring gitlab-shell to its current version 2.7.2. Also incorporate a patch from Dmitry for gitlab-workhorse to fetch the port from its correct MASTERSITE.

Buildtests are done for 9.3, 10.0, 10.1, 10.2 and 10.3 amd64 and i386. Also a test installation works fine.

Greetings,
Torsten
